summary: Completed comprehensive pre-deployment frontend testing of OLL Multi-user skill education platform. All 13 requested features verified working correctly.

features_verified.verification: Landing page loads correctly with hero section 'Learn Future Skills for a Brighter Future'. Navigation works. Learner, Educator, and School cards visible with data-testid attributes.

Button visible and clickable. Dialog opens with new options: Course Information, Partnership Opportunities, Existing Customer Support (with sub-options: Missing/Damaged Kit, LMS Login Help, Class/Schedule Issue, Payment Query), Join OLL, and Other.

Page loads with 'How can we help you?' flow selection. 'I want to learn a skill' and 'I have a query / need support' options visible. Skill selection (Robotics, Coding, AI, Entrepreneurship, Financial Literacy) works correctly.
Page loads with 'Transform Your School with Future Skills' heading. View Details and Book a Meeting CTAs visible. Stats section shows 500+ Partner Schools, 50,000+ Students Trained, etc.
Page loads with 'Join OLL as an Educator' heading. Application form visible with Personal Information, Professional Details, Skills selection, Grades, Availability, and Teaching Mode options.
Page loads with 'Partner with OLL' heading. Apply Now CTA visible. 'Who Are We Looking For?' section displays partner requirements.
Page loads with 'Our Offerings' heading. Programs displayed: Robotics, Coding & Programming, AI & Machine Learning, Entrepreneurship, Financial Literacy. For Individuals and For Schools tabs visible.
Page loads with 'Join OLL Team' heading. General Application form visible with Full Name, Email, Phone, Role, Experience Level, City, Availability, LinkedIn, Portfolio, Resume upload fields.
Login page loads. Successfully logged in with admin@oll.co / Dagaji03@. Redirected to admin dashboard.

Dashboard loads after login showing stats: 79 Total Students, 49 New Leads, 2 Converted, 54 Schools, 25 Educators, 10 Support. Overdue items section visible. Quick Actions and Content Management sections present.
School CRM page loads with Dashboard, Leads & Schools, Contact Management tabs. Shows 0 Meetings This Week, 1 Followups Due, 5 Active Schools, 18 New Leads. Followup Schedule visible.

Growth Partners page loads with tabs: New Leads (10), In Discussion (0), Onboarding (13), Active Partners (2), Discontinued (1), Archived (1). Training Complete badge visible in Onboarding tab for 'Usha Bihani' with 'Ready to Activate' status.

Under Review screen displays correctly showing: 'Under Review 🎯' heading, completed steps checklist (Personal Information, Bank Details, Contract Signing, Onboarding Fees Payment, Kit Delivery Confirmed, All 7 Training Modules Completed), and 'What happens next?' info.
Welcome screen displays correctly showing: 'Welcome to OLL! 🎉' heading for 'Usha Bihani', Login Details section, and 'Login to Dashboard' button.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All major user flows verified working. Need Help button has new options (Course Info, Partnership, Support with kit/LMS/class/payment sub-options, Join OLL). GP Onboarding shows Under Review for completed training (token 6434ba0d) and Welcome screen for activated GPs (token e1696142). Admin dashboard and CRM pages load correctly with data.
